full_text:
Xiahou Ru (Junlin) 夏侯儒
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Ru (夏侯儒), styledJunlin, was born in Pei. Held variety of posts in northwest and in Jing, later replaced in one by Xiahou Ba. Xiahou Ru was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
